name: iPXE network bootloader
signed-by: Third-party CA (distribution-specific) or self-signed via MOK
cve-notes: iPXE 1.20.1 and earlier had CVE-2022-43097 (HTTP header parsing). 1.21.1+ fixed.
notes: iPXE is a PXE-compatible network bootloader often chained from a first-stage boot manager for disk-less boot. Common on servers and NOS-managed fleets (AWS Nitro / GCE / Azure).
